heading: Petition by hydraulic miners
label: 669 Petition by hydraulic miners
text: The individual proprietor or proprietors, or in case of a corporation, its manager or agent appointed for that purpose, owning mining ground in the territory in the State of California mentioned in , which it is desired to work by the hydraulic process, must file with said commission a verified petition, setting forth such facts as will comply with law and the rules prescribed by said commission.section 663 of this title
notes: Transfer of FunctionsCalifornia Debris Commission abolished and functions transferred to Secretary of the Army by , , , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–662, title XI, § 1106100 Stat. 4229section 661 of this titleNov. 17, 1986
